case_title: TERRANOVA, ALBERT VS MARK OLSON ELECTRIC INC.

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF SEP-12-2005, GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TERRANOVA, ALBERT AS TO DEFENDANT MARK OLSON ELECTRIC INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR A CONTC ORDER FILED(VIA MAIL).
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLTF. SENT TO COURT FOR COMM. SIGNATURE ($10 FEE PD. CASH).

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION ***-**-****, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-17-2005 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 MEDIATED SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $3,500. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARK OLSON ELECTRIC INC. NO APPEARANCE BY PARTIES. MEDIATED SETTLEMENT AND CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARK OLSON ELECTRIC INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TERRANOVA, ALBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARK OLSON ELECTRIC INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $47.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,047.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-09-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-13-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-13-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-11-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MARK OLSON ELECTRIC INC. HEARING SET FOR SEP-12-2005 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MARK OLSON ELECTRIC INC.
